title: Cadence (CDNS) Q3 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates

title: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) Beats Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.26 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.21 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.06 per share a year ago.

title: Cadence Design Systems Tops Q3 Views But Misses With Outlook
text: Cadence Design Systems beat Wall Street's targets for the third quarter but disappointed with its outlook for the current period.

title: Cadence Design Systems' stock dips on disappointing guidance
text: Shares of Cadence Design Systems Inc. CDNS, +0.54%, a maker of electronic-design-automation software, dipped more than 4% Monday after it reported third-quarter earnings that beat Wall Street estimates but offered outlook for its current fourth quarter that disappointed investors. Cadence said it earned an adjusted $1.26 a share on sales of $1.02 billion, topping the projections of analysts polled by FactSet.
